flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pinellas Technical College-Clearwater fell 42% between 2006 and 2009 (98.0% → 56.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Pinellas Technical College-Clearwater rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (62.0% → 72.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pinellas Technical College-Clearwater rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (644 → 732).
